title: Tebery 100 Pack Gold Plastic Cups Tumblers, 10oz Clear Reusable Wedding Cups Elegant Party Cup with Gold Rim
features: 10oz shiny crystal gold rimmed fancy plastic cups perfect for wine, champagne, soda, water, juice, beer, liquor, mixed drinks, punch and teas.
Dimenson: 9.5 cm tall | 7.3 cm mouth diameter, 5.4 cm base diameter.
Made of durable heavy duty quality plastic, food-grade and BPA-free; bulk pack of 100 gold plastic cups to accommodate all your guests.
Enhance the beauty of any occasion from weddings to holiday parties with these crystal clear drinking cups that feature a beautiful gold rim.
These plastic reusable cups will save you the effort of having to wash tens of glasses,just toss the cups when youre done. The economical and smart choice when it comes to party planning!
description: Product Description Tebery Gold Rimmed Plastic Cups, Clear Crystal Plastic Tumblers Cups, Resuable Plastic Shot Glasses, Wedding Cups Elegant Party Cups This plastic cup is shaped like a traditional round tumbler and made of durable clear hard plastic, won't scratch or break easily. These fancy plastic cups are perfect for catered events, cocktail parties, bars, nightclubs or any other event where you require an economical alternative to permanent glassware. The gold color c be paired with any color of the beverage to make your party elegant and refined. These decorative cups will impress even the pickiest of guests! Shiny crystal gold rimmed fancy plastic resuable cups perfect for wine, champagne, soda, water, juice, beer, liquor, mixed drinks, punch and teas. Each cup offers enough capacity which is the perfect size to hold a standard can of soft drink or soda. Simple and traditional, these cups will showcase cold ice cube balls in carbon beverages. Shiny crystal gold rimmed fancy plastic resuable cups Made of durable clear hard plastic Perfect for catered events, cocktail parties, bars, nightclubs Reusable plastic is deal when catering for big numbers to cut down on breakages. Great for entertaining during the festive season to use at home or at office Xmas parties. To reuse, simply wash with soap and warm water and allow it to dry. Enhance the beauty of any occasion from weddings to holiday parties with these crystal clear drinking cups that feature a beautiful gold rim. Perfect when catering for outdoor events and activities such as BBQs, picnics, weddings and camping, at the beach, in the garden or at the park.
